summary.para: The HTTP status code for the search. The API returns this property only for completed searches.
The timestamp, in milliseconds since the Unix epoch, when Elasticsearch will delete the search and its results, even if the search is still running.

If true, the response does not contain complete search results. If is_partial is true and is_running is true, the search is still running. If is_partial is true but is_running is false, the results are partial due to a failure or timeout.
If true, the search is still running. If false, the search has finished.
The timestamp, in milliseconds since the Unix epoch, when the search started. The API returns this property only for running searches.
